summary: Updated the runtime adapter roadmap after Agent-World and the environment-synthesis paper. The update keeps fixture replay as the immediate wedge and adds executable environment artifacts as a later layer.

agentTurn.user_prompt: do u want to update the roadmap after these two papers?
agentTurn.assistant_summary: Updated docs/runtime-adapter-roadmap.html with a Paper-Informed Delta section, an environment.spec.json row, an environment_artifact.v1 sketch, Phase F for executable environment artifacts, and positioning for Agent-World and environment synthesis. The roadmap now states that Datalox starts with finite replay fixture worlds, later supports generator/renderer/scorer environment artifacts, and should remain the evidence, replay, registry, fixture, and export layer rather than claiming to synthesize every environment itself.

tool_calls.output_summary: Active replay docs gate passed: 1 file, 7 tests.

file_changes.diff_summary: Added paper-informed roadmap delta, executable environment artifact schema sketch, Phase F, and Agent-World/environment-synthesis positioning while preserving fixture replay as the immediate product path.

verification.command: PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npx vitest run tests/replayCanonicalDocs.test.ts && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npm run check && git diff --check
verification.evidence: Active replay docs gate passed: 1 file, 7 tests. TypeScript no-emit check passed. git diff --check passed.
